allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('/Users/renukakumar9030gmail.com/Work/code-smith/web/.next/server/app/docs/[step]/[[...view]]/page.js.nft.json'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const path=require\('path'\); const base='/Users/renukakumar9030gmail.com/Work/code-smith/web/.next/server/app/docs/[step]/[[...view]]'; const sizes={}; let total=0; for\(const f of j.files\){try{const p=path.resolve\(base,f\); const s=fs.statSync\(p\).size; total+=s; const key=f.replace\(/.*node_modules\\//,'node_modules/'\).split\('/'\).slice\(0,3\).join\('/'\); sizes[key]=\(sizes[key]||0\)+s;}catch\(e\){}} const sorted=Object.entries\(sizes\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0,30\); console.log\('TOTAL:', \(total/1024/1024\).toFixed\(2\),'MB'\); console.log\('FILE COUNT:', j.files.length\); for\(const [k,v] of sorted\) console.log\(\(v/1024/1024\).toFixed\(2\)+'MB',k\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('/Users/renukakumar9030gmail.com/Work/code-smith/web/.next/prerender-manifest.json'\); const docsRoutes=Object.keys\(j.routes||{}\).filter\(r=>r.startsWith\('/docs'\)\); console.log\('Prerendered docs routes:', docsRoutes.length\); console.log\(docsRoutes.slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('Dynamic routes:'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.dynamicRoutes||{}\).filter\(r=>r.includes\('docs'\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('/Users/renukakumar9030gmail.com/Work/code-smith/web/.next/server/app/docs/[step]/[[...view]]/page.js.nft.json'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const path=require\('path'\); const base='/Users/renukakumar9030gmail.com/Work/code-smith/web/.next/server/app/docs/[step]/[[...view]]'; const large=[]; for\(const f of j.files\){try{const p=path.resolve\(base,f\); const s=fs.statSync\(p\).size; large.push\([s,f]\);}catch\(e\){}} large.sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[0]-a[0]\); for\(const [s,f] of large.slice\(0,10\)\) console.log\(\(s/1024/1024\).toFixed\(3\)+'MB', f\);")
